text: The hallway is eerily quiet and bathed in sparse, harsh lighting. The angled perspective adds to a sense of disorientation or waiting. In the second image, even the wall’s invitation to research and development feels faint, almost lost in darkness. My mind drifts—am I at the edge of innovation, or simply lost in a sterile, impersonal maze? The absence of others amplifies my solitude; I am both observer and subject, quietly unsettled but curious about what lies beyond the glass doors.
